description: Make the operator pi-context binary a publish-free local copy of the working tree, immune to dev builds. Today /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context is an npm link symlink into packages/pi-context-cli/dist/, so npm run build (rm -rf dist && tsc) repoints and transiently removes the live operator binary. Retire the link; install the operator binary as a packed copy of the working-tree CLI + its @davidorex dependency set (current code, not the stale registry 0.31.0); add a promote:cli root npm-task fronting scripts/promote-cli.mjs (build, pack the set, install into the global prefix, verify a non-symlink copy), fitting the version:* / release:* composer convention. Scope: the binary coupling only — not the proving-ground harness, a CI gate, or schema-evolution work.
acceptance_criteria: realpath /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context resolves under /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli/, not under /Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension. /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli is a regular directory, not a symlink. npm ls -g --link does not list @davidorex/pi-context-cli. (Measure the resolved package directory; the bin entry is a shim symlink and is not measured.)

After npm run build in the repo, /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli/dist/bin.js (the realpath target of the bin shim) has an unchanged inode and an unchanged content hash relative to before the build. pi-context --version runs successfully.

With the repo workspace absent or moved, pi-context context-status --cwd <dir> runs and reflects working-tree behavior — the operator carries the working-tree @davidorex/pi-context (and @davidorex/pi-project-workflows for pi-context pi-bound), not the stale registry version.

A promote:cli root npm-task installs the operator copy publish-free (pack + global install, never npm link); scripts/promote-cli.mjs contains no npm link; the task fronts a scripts/*.mjs choreographer matching the release:* / version:* convention.

After a repo source edit and a re-promote at the same version, the content hash of /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli/dist/bin.js (the realpath target) differs from its pre-edit hash. (Promote builds the working tree before packing; the bin shim path is stable and is not measured.)
npm pack of packages/pi-context-cli ships the runnable shape (dist/bin.js; bin.pi-context -> ./dist/bin.js); the installed tarball yields a working pi-context.

docs-surface-sync: a repo-wide audit finds no doc instructing npm link for the operator binary; packages/pi-context-cli/README.md:10 and root README.md:22,42 state the copy install. Audit only — edit only what the change makes stale.
scripts/promote-cli.mjs exits non-zero, emitting no npm rm -g or npm i -g, when the real-global arm is reached with an inherited npm_config_prefix present and no --prefix/PROMOTE_PREFIX given.

No npm rm -g or npm i -g executes unless the prefix passes validation: absolute path, not equal to the repo root, not under the repo root, and — for the real-global arm — an existing directory containing lib/node_modules.
After install, scripts/promote-cli.mjs runs the realpath guard.
scripts/promote-cli.mjs resolves the real-global prefix from npm prefix -g invoked with all npm_config_* variables removed from its environment.
Given --prefix <dir>, scripts/promote-cli.mjs uses <dir> as the prefix and completes the promote (emits npm rm -g/npm i -g against <dir>).
Given PROMOTE_PREFIX=<dir> and no --prefix, scripts/promote-cli.mjs uses <dir> as the prefix and completes the promote.
With no inherited npm_config_prefix, no --prefix, and no PROMOTE_PREFIX, scripts/promote-cli.mjs completes the real-global promote against the prefix from npm prefix -g.
notes: Addresses issue-004. Scope: the binary coupling only.
